provider.description: ASR provider id. Only 'openai_whisper' is wired in this PR; local-model providers (local_whisper, faster_whisper, distil_whisper) are accepted by the schema but rejected at Init pending #92.

api_key_env.description: Env var that holds the API key. Default OPENAI_API_KEY.

api_key.description: Inline API key. Overrides api_key_env when set.

endpoint.description: Override URL for the transcription endpoint (test injection).

provider.description: TTS provider id. Only 'openai' is wired in this PR; local-model providers (kokoro, local_*, *_local) are accepted by the schema but rejected at Init pending #92.

api_key_env.description: Env var that holds the API key. Default OPENAI_API_KEY.

api_key.description: Inline API key. Overrides api_key_env when set.

streaming.description: Always true in v1; reserved for future non-streaming mode.

endpoint.description: Override URL for the speech endpoint (test injection).

chunk_bytes.description: Frame size in bytes for emitted output chunks. Default 8192.

threshold.description: RMS energy threshold (normalized 0..1) above which the buffer is considered speech. Default 0.02.

silence_ms.description: Milliseconds of below-threshold audio that triggers an utterance flush. Default 600.

enabled.description: Cancel an in-flight TTS turn when new speech is detected. Default true.

threshold.description: RMS threshold above which an incoming chunk is treated as barge-in. Default 0.02.

text_fallback.description: Allow io.input from non-voice transports to flow through unchanged. Default true.
